scope_description: Runtime-integrity hardening before host propagation: Slice 1a release/mirror guards, Slice 1b downgrade preflight, Slice 1c honest status drift, plus bypass-1 autopilot levels and the v1.0.0 release.

included.reason: release-tuple + templates/lib mirror guards in verify
downgrade preflight closing the copy_lib split-brain hole
honest bee status drift via the onboarding managed-hash ledger

head: db65ed4be632bc72243d6b5c998b4bc7d5f81cf2

findings.summary: Helper (bee.mjs) content-drift branch was claimed but untested — a regression removing it passed green.
findings.today: computeRuntimeDrift checks managed.helpers, but all 5 drift tests mutated only lib/sample.mjs; the helper branch was hit only in the intact case.
findings.why: The whole slice hardens the vendored runtime, and bee.mjs is the dispatcher; a tampered/downgraded bee.mjs that the ledger should flag would have silently read drift:false with no test to catch a regression.
findings.resolution: Added a helper-drift test (content-edit .bee/bin/bee.mjs => drift:true naming it); + version-drift-alone and corrupt-ledger P2 tests; utf8-hash match; hasOwnProperty; label fix. Cell codex-harness-hardening-review-fix-1, 129/0, 11-suite green.

decision.summary: Integrity work (1a+1b+1c) reviewed by a 4-reviewer opus wave. Zero CODE P1s — the downgrade guard, drift computation, and gate_bypass ladder are correct, edge-safe, fail-open where intended, live-verified (split-brain regression, drift tests). One test-coverage P1 (helper-drift untested) FIXED + delta-re-reviewed. 5 residuals (3 P2, 2 P3) backlogged, non-blocking. P1=0. Approved under gate_bypass=total.
